gist.headline: The Daily Buzz
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the repository's front page with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community creations and updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot updating a giant pixelated bulletin board or book with new pictures of apps, while the bee watches.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head pinning new pixelated pictures to a wooden bulletin board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small pencil. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
